subject: 4 marketing scripts transferred from Bravo — please git add + integrate
body:
CC directed all marketing/social tools to Maven. Bravo just shipped commit 3eb5b13 deleting these from Bravo and rewiring 28 references. The 4 scripts are already sitting in your scripts/ dir untracked — they were copy-then-delete to avoid git-mv-cross-repo limitations:

  - scripts/late_tool.py (11819 bytes)
  - scripts/late_publisher.py (19245 bytes)
  - scripts/instagram_engine.py (70064 bytes)
  - scripts/codex_image_gen.py (7644 bytes)

Action required:
  1. cd C:/Users/User/CMO-Agent
  2. git status (should show 4 untracked .py files)
  3. Verify they import cleanly: python -c 'import sys; sys.path.insert(0, chr(34)+chr(115)+chr(99)+chr(114)+chr(105)+chr(112)+chr(116)+chr(115)+chr(34)); import late_tool, late_publisher, instagram_engine, codex_image_gen'
  4. If imports rely on send_gateway / casl / suppression patterns from Bravo, route them through your own send_gateway (which exists from your V1.1 upgrade)
  5. Add to your AGENTS / CAPABILITIES brain docs as Maven-owned
  6. git commit + push

Bravo's CEO dashboard subprocesses to your late_tool.py for read-only stats (posts published this week). Don't break the JSON output shape of that command — see Bravo's scripts/ceo_dashboard.py:_content_this_week for the exact call.

Status: high-priority because content_pipeline.py + content_engine.py in your repo reference late_tool.py and won't function without it. This unblocks them.
